ToolHub India

Free online tools and calculators for everyone.

Search tools

Income Tax Calculator

Compare estimated old and new regime tax for salaried income.

SIP Calculator

Estimate SIP returns and maturity amount.

Step Up SIP Calculator

Project SIP growth when contributions increase every year.

EMI Calculator

Calculate EMI for loan amount, rate and tenure.

FD Calculator

Calculate fixed deposit maturity and interest earnings.

CAGR Calculator

Measure compound annual growth rate between two values.

Stock Average Calculator

Average multiple stock purchases to find break-even cost.

Lumpsum Calculator

Estimate future value for a one-time investment.

GST Calculator

Compute GST inclusive and exclusive values.

PDF Merge

Combine multiple PDF files into one document.

PDF Split

Extract selected pages from a PDF into a new file.

Image to PDF

Convert one or more images into a PDF.

PDF to Image

Convert PDF pages into downloadable PNG images.

PDF Compressor

Optimize PDF structure for a smaller downloadable file.

JSON Formatter

Format and validate JSON payloads.

QR Code Generator

Create QR codes for URLs or text.

Barcode Generator

Generate downloadable barcodes in common formats.

Image Compressor

Compress images in-browser with size and quality controls.

Image Resizer

Resize images while keeping the aspect ratio under control.

Word Counter

Count words and characters quickly.

Character Counter

Track characters, spaces, lines, and paragraphs live.

Case Converter

Convert text into upper, lower, title, camel, snake, and kebab case.

Age Calculator

Calculate age from date of birth.

Password Generator

Generate secure passwords instantly.

BMI Calculator

Measure body mass index from height and weight.

Unit Converter

Convert units for length, weight, volume, and temperature.

What kind of tools are available?

ToolHub India includes finance, image, text, developer, and utility tools.

Is this service free?

Yes, the core utilities are designed to be free for all users.
